Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg'}
{3: 'The city lies silent beneath the heavy cloak of dusk, as if it has fallen into a deep slumber.'}
{3: 'Only the sound of footsteps from afar echoes through the night as two figures enter the city, breaking the deathly stillness.'}
{3: 'A gray-clad figure walks alongside a young girl, their silhouettes outlined by the pale light of a waning moon as they step into the city. But the girl seems unable to bear such silence.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Huh, there\'s no fog right now, so why isn\'t there a single person on the streets?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Don\'t tell me the Mist that was here was so thick that everyone in the city went mad and attacked each other, and now we\'re left with a ghost town...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The girl paints an increasingly vivid picture of her wild fantasy, her expression growing more serious.'}
{2: 'Stop it already.', 3: '13', 4: 'Enough with the ghost stories.', 5: '13', 6: 'That conspiracy is completely unfounded.', 7: '13'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg6501_4.jpg'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'What do you mean? That was obviously evidence-based deduction!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'We just got here. We don\'t understand the situation yet.', 3: '16'}
{2: 'We should be more cautious.', 3: '17'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'But come to think of it, this is the first time our detective agency has taken on such a weird case.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'A cross-county investigation with an unspecified target and a client that didn\'t show up in person... We have to double our fee when we close this case!', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.8', 5: '0.3'}
{1: '1', 3: 'She pulls out a telegram and examines it over and over.', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.8', 4: '0', 5: '0'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory968.png'}
{1: 'Requesting "Gray Raven" Detective Agency to investigate a local case involving "Bloodthirsty Siren".', 2: '000000ff', 3: '1', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory968.png', 7: '1'}
{1: 'Location: Sheriff\'s residence.', 2: '000000ff', 3: '0.5', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory968.png', 7: '1'}
{1: 'Please come at once at your earliest convenience. Or inconvenience.', 2: '000000ff', 3: '0.7', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory968.png', 7: '1'}
{1: '—Sheriff Veronica', 2: '000000ff', 3: '0.3', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory968.png', 7: '1', 9: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.8', 5: '0'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Enclosed with the telegram is a crude hand-drawn map marking the exact location of the sheriff\'s estate.', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.8', 4: '0', 5: '0.3'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'I can\'t make heads or tails of this cryptic nonsense... What\'s a "Bloodthirsty Siren"? And this client is way too blunt.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'The way I see it... the commission letter itself is a mystery case!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'The key, of course, is the "Bloodthirsty Siren".', 3: '46'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'It\'s certainly quite intriguing...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'We\'ll discuss the specifics once we meet with the client.', 3: '48'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1473.jpg'}
{3: 'You walk side by side, making your way toward the destination marked on the map.'}
{3: 'In the distance, the figure of a woman staggers into view.'}
{3: 'The woman moves with wobbly steps toward a tall building on the street corner.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1483.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1483.jpg'}
{3: 'In a city that has fallen into slumber, this building alone blazes with light, standing out starkly against the darkness.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1483.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1483.jpg'}
{3: 'Though the doors and windows are tightly shut, faint sounds of prayer can be heard from within.'}
{3: 'The brass plate by the entrance reads "House of Peace", glowing dimly under the gaslight.'}
{3: 'The visitor knocks on the heavy door, and it swings open moments later with a resounding boom, revealing a man who seems to be in a managerial position.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory710.jpg', 2: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Dazed Woman', 3: 'I\'ve come... to seek... the Siren\'s... protection...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The man who answered the door nods, stepping aside to let her enter before shutting the door behind her.'}
{3: 'The conversation is barely audible in the distance, but Eileena\'s sharp ears have picked up on crucial information.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'That woman just mentioned a "siren"... Could she be talking about the "Bloodthirsty Siren" from our case?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Very likely. We can\'t afford to overlook any leads.', 3: '92'}
{2: 'But being "detectives" won\'t help us investigate further.', 3: '93'}
{3: 'Having worked together long enough, you two share an unspoken understanding, and Eileena smiles knowingly.'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Got it. Time for us to assume new identities, great detective—wait, no. Let me think of what we should be instead.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'I\'ll be a travel writer, and you\'ll be...', 4: '1'}
{2: '...The travel writer\'s "mentor"?', 3: '99'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Perfect. This should do the trick.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'All right, time to investigate—I mean, time for this travel writer to gather material on the legend of the "Bloodthirsty Siren"! Let\'s go!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Eileena pulls a thick notebook from her bag and clutches it to her chest with exaggerated earnestness, every inch the dedicated author.'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: '"House of Peace"... What a strange name. Is it some kind of sanatorium? Or maybe a place of worship?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Either way, they shouldn\'t turn away a travel writer and her mentor doing research, right, 【kuroname】?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'You answer Eileena\'s question with a look, though something about this unusual building puts you on edge.'}
{2: '(Knock on the door)', 3: '113'}
{3: 'After several knocks, the heavy door cracks open slightly.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory710.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A man who appears to be some kind of manager emerges, his eyes scrutinizing the two visitors with cautious wariness.'}
{3: 'Behind him, numerous figures can be seen in the spacious hall of the House of Peace despite the dim lighting.'}
{3: 'They sit quietly in their seats, all facing a small podium at the center of the room.'}
{3: 'But the expressions on their faces appear more indifferent than tranquil.'}
{3: 'Sitting in silence, they show not even the slightest interest in the arrival of strangers.'}
{3: 'It seems your arrival has interrupted some kind of clandestine gathering.'}
{2: 'I\'m a travel writer. This is my student.', 3: '135'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'That\'s right! My mentor and I have been traveling to gather material for my detective novel. I want to research everything: ghost stories, murder cases, you name it!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'I heard there\'s been a case involving a "Bloodthirsty Siren" here. I\'m very interested!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'If you don\'t mind, can you tell me more about it?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Eileena seamlessly picks up where you left off, quickly slipping into her role as the travel writer\'s student.'}
{3: 'But a barely perceptible flash of menace crosses the man\'s eyes, as if he distrusts the two strangers standing before him.'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'I\'m afraid you\'ll be disappointed. It\'s nothing more than some boring ghost stories.', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Ever since the Mist arrived, everyone in the city has been living in fear of perishing in it, never to see another dawn again.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'This is simply a sanctuary for the troubled souls. I\'m Roko, the one who organizes things here.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'Panic gripped the city when the Mist descended, so we gather here, praying for the day it will finally lift.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'All I can do is offer these lost souls what little peace I can provide.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Before she can concoct another lie, the dazed woman from before suddenly drifts up behind Roko like a specter.'}
{2: 'Dazed Woman', 3: 'The "Bloodthirsty Siren"... she... walks in the Mist...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Dazed Woman', 3: 'We... are waiting... for the Siren... to arrive...', 4: '2'}
{3: 'You step forward protectively, placing yourself between Eileena and the woman.'}
{2: 'Stay away from her, Eileena!', 3: '169'}
{3: 'But the woman pays no heed to your warning, continuing her deranged chants.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Dazed Woman', 3: 'We... are waiting... for the Siren... to arrive...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Dazed Woman', 3: 'Offer... blood... to the Siren...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Strange sounds begin to emerge from her body.'}
{3: 'Several fat rats scurry out from her coat, fleeing quickly and vanishing into the darkness.'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'It\'s nothing. Go back and continue praying.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Roko\'s words seem to carry an eerie power like some dark incantation. The terror fades from the woman\'s eyes, and she returns to her original vacant state.'}
{3: 'She returns to her spot, acting as if nothing had happened.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'If it\'s okay, can I speak with her?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Roko', 3: 'I\'m afraid that won\'t work.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'But she clearly just said...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'And what\'s with those rats?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'We have our way of doing things.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'Travelers, either join us in prayer, or stop disturbing the peace of these souls.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'The doors of the House of Peace must now be closed to you.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1483.jpg'}
{3: 'Before you can glean any further information from the disturbed woman\'s strange words, Roko shuts the door.'}
{3: 'Eileena stares helplessly at the heavy door that has slammed shut before you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Eileena', 3: 'This place feels like some kind of gathering spot for mad townsfolk whose minds have been addled by the Mist...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'And that strange woman just now... Why was she carrying rats around? Who keeps rats as pets?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'This whole thing just keeps getting more complicated.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Eileena rattles off several troubling questions in quick succession, clearly disturbed by what she has witnessed, yet powerless to do anything about it.'}
{2: 'Her behavior was strange, but her words were deliberate.', 3: '213'}
{2: 'People driven mad by the Mist don\'t speak with such clarity.', 3: '214'}
{2: 'The people and the vibe of this place... just feel wrong.', 3: '215'}
{2: 'That man Roko is clearly hiding something from us.', 3: '216'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'It looks like we travel writers didn\'t get much useful material for our story here, "mentor."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Eileena', 3: 'Let\'s go find our client instead.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She lets out an exaggerated sigh and snaps her notebook shut, trying to ease the sting of the failed plan with your little charade.'}
{3: 'After Eileena and you leave, the door of the House of Peace swings open once more.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory710.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Roko silently watches your departure with a knowing smile across his face, as if everything has gone exactly according to plan.'}
{3: 'It seems everything he displayed moments ago was nothing but an elaborate act.'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'So these are your "allies"...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Roko', 3: 'Heh, don\'t think you can change anything about this, my dearest... Sheriff.', 4: '1'}
